name: Szagoleves (Sage Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the sage and lemon rind in 3 cups of water for about 30 minutes.
2. Strain the mixture.
3. Add sugar, lemon juice to taste, and wine. Bring to a boil.
4. Put the cinnamon stick in a soup tureen and pour the soup over. Serve in cups.
Note: This is a spiced drink as much as a soup, from Gyula Vasvary, master chef of the 1820s.
